name: design-audit
description: Design audit — validate existing code and designs against PatternFly standards
intent: Validate existing code/designs against PF standards
decisionTest: Does this check whether existing code or designs follow PF standards?
crossRef: Use this plugin when you're **checking** whether existing code or designs follow PF standards. For help **choosing** the right PF components and patterns when building, see [design-guide](../design-guide/).
